subcodes.first_line: O servant of the beloved of God, O usurper of the right of this 'Abdu'l-Bahá, in service to the friends and ministration to the companions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم احباء الله ای غاصب حق این عبدالبهاء زیرا خدمت یاران و خادمی دوستان
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @personal instructions, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God
